titleStmt.title: SII 41.2: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 2. (A.R. No. 2 of 1905.) Tirukkōyilūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: South wall of the first prakāra of the Trivikrama-perumāl temple.

This records the deed of exchange for several pieces of land (details given) by Taṇḍēsvaran of Tiruvīraṭṭānamuḍaiya Nayinār temple at Tirukkōvalūr, in Kuṟukkai-kūṟṟam, a district of Jananāthavaḻanādu alias Milāḍu, as kshētra parivattanai, to the deity Sēnāpati-Ālvān of Tiruviḍaikaḻi Emberumāṉ temple at Tirukkōvalūr. Taṇḍēśvaraṉ also spelt as Chaṇḍēśvaraṉ and Sēnāpati Āḻvāṉ are evidently the representative deities of the Śaivaite and Vaishnavaite pantheons. In enumerating the boundaries of the land the record refers to Kaṇḍaraṅkuśan vāykkāl as also to two inscriptions “Nūṟṟukkala variśai-paṟṟu kalveṭṭu” and “Kīḻvaḷai kalveṭṭu.”

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ Īḻamumaturaiyum pāṇṭiyan muṭittalaiyum kacciyum karuvūruṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulottuṅkacoḻa devaṟkuyāṇṭu 2 10 4 vatuṛṣabhaṉāyaṟṟu malāṭākiya jaṉa
ṉātavaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaik kūṟṟattu tirukkovalūr Uṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭāṉa muṭaiyaṉāyaṉār koyil taṇṭecuraṉen Ittāṉattāroṭum meva meṟppaṭiyūr tiruviṭaikaḻi Emperumān koyil [śrī]
ceṉāpati Āḻvānukku kṣettira parivattaṉait tiṭṭuk kuṭutta paricāvatu tiruviṭaikaḻi Emperumān tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam pūccūṭṭuk kālukku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai tiruviṭaikaḻi Emperumān tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam A
marāṭa vallavan tirunantavaṉattukkum palavāyutavallavan tiruntavaṉattukkum caṟṟuk kuṭātān vāykkālukkut teṟku kiḻpāṟkellai tirumañcaṉa Oḻukkaikku meṟkut teṉpāṟkellai ciṟṟeri vāykkālāna
kaṇṭaraṅkucan vāykkālukku vaṭakkum Innānkellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nilamāvatu Uṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiya nayiṉār tevatāṉam nūṟṟukkala varicaippaṟṟu kalveṭṭuppaṭi ciṟupāṭikāval niṅkum mel vaḷaitaṭi
palaviṉāl kuḻi 1000 3 100 9 10 4(1/4)m kiḻvaḷai kalveṭṭuppaṭi ciṟupāṭikāval niṅku nūṟṟuk kalavaricaippaṟṟut taṭipalaviṉāl kuḻi 2 1000 100 5 10 2m Āka kuḻi 1000 8 100 4 10 6(1/4)m cuppiramaṇṇiya piḷḷaiyār tevatāṉam
nūṟṟuk kalavaricaip paṟṟu kuḻi 1000 2 100 5 10m Āka kuḻi 4 1000 6 10 6(1/4)m Eṇpatiṉ kalavaricaippaṟṟu tiruvāykkeḻvippaṭi peṇṇai peruñceṟuttaṭi Onṟu kuḻi 5 100 8 10 7 Iṅku viṭṭuk kiḻakku meṭṭut tevan pokkil tiruviṭai
kaḻi Emperumān tiruviṭaiy(āṭi)āṭṭacceṟuvukku teṟku taṭi Onṟukuḻi 3 100 4 10 7(1/4) m Āka palavaricai peṟṟa kuḻi rūpāy 1000 3 10 6(1/4)m puñcai nilattu Innāyanār tevatāṉam kalveṭṭuppaṭi ponnampala kūttan tirunant(ā)vāṉa caṟṟukku
ṭātān vāykkālukku vaṭakku melpāṟkellai tiruvuviṭai kaḻi Emperumān tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam palavāyutavallavan tirunantavaṉattukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai peṇṇaiāṟṟukku teṟkkuk kiḻpāṟkellai naraciṅka
panman tirunantavaṉattukku meṟkum Innāṉkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa kuḻi 5 100itil mel nokkiṉa maramum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum Uḷpaṭa viṭṭukuṭuttu koḷvatāṉa tiruviṭaikaḻi Emperumāṉ tiruiṭaiyāṭṭattil
koḷvatāṉa nilamāvatu tiruppaāṭalicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉa tarattukkuk kiḻakku tenpāṟkellai ciṟṟerivāykkāl Āṉa kaṇṭaraṅkucan vāykkālukku vaṭakku kiḻpāṟkellaicu perumpaḷḷi
ccantattukku meṟkum vaṭapāṟkellai tiruviṭaikaḻi Emperumān tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam ciṟupulattukkum caṟṟukuṭātān vāykkālukku teṟkkum Innānkellaikkuḷppaṭa nūṟṟukkalavaricaip paṟṟukkuḻi
4 100 5 10tum Iṅkuviṭṭu tiruvitikkuk kiḻakku tirukkapālicuramuṭaiya nāyanār tevatāṉattukkum cittirameḻippiḷḷaiyār tevatānattukku teṟkum mel pāṟkellai ciṟṟeri vāykkālukku kiḻakkum tenpāṟkellai Ivvāy
kālukku vaṭakkum kiḻpāṟkellai malāṭuṭaiyārkaḷ tivicappaṟṟukkāvukku meṟkum Innānkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa nūṟṟukkalavaricaipaṟṟuk kiḻ (kiḻ) taṭi Iraṇṭiṉāl kuḻi 8 10 5 Itankiḻ
malāṭuṭaiyār tivicappaṟṟu taṭi Oṉṟukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kukankuḻit tukaṉakappaṭikkum malāṭuṭaiyārkaḷ tivicappaṟṟut taṭi Oṉṟukku teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Ūr
taṭi Iraṇṭināl kuḻi munnūṟṟuāṟukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai ciṟṟeri karaiyu miṉṉānkellai Uḷppaṭṭa tiruvaraṅkaviḷākam nūṟṟukkalavaricaipaṟṟu taṭi munṟināl kuḻi 63 10 4iṅku viṭṭu vaṭakku tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam
turavañceṟu taṭi Onṟu kuḻi 4 100ṟum Itan meṟkkut taṭi Onṟu kuḻi 100 2 10 8m Āka kuḻi 5 100 2 10 8m Iṅku viṭṭu teṟku ciṟṟerikaraikkum vāykkālum teṟkum melpāṟkellai kukan kuḻikaraikku kiḻakkum kiḻpāṟkellai toppu
tūmpukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Oṭaikku vaṭakkum Innānkellai karumāṇikka viḷāka Uṭtaṭi palavināl Eṇpatin kalavaricaippaṟṟu kuḻi 1000 6 100 3 10 5mitan teṟku tiruviṭaikaḻi Emperumān tiruviṭaiyā
ṭṭam cittirameḻi maṭappuṟam Oṉṟukku teṟku taṭipalavinaāl kuḻi 1000 4 100 6 10 5 Āka kuḻi rūpāy 1000 5 100 4 10 7 Itil varicaikku varicai tāḻvukkum peṇṇainetivāṇa marakkālukku Ulakaḷanta marakkāl vācik
ku niṅkuṅkuḻi 5 100 10 5mukkāl puñcai nilattil ponnampalakkūttat tirunaṉtavaṉaṅ kuḻi rūpāy100kku nilantaṉam vāciēṟṟi tiruviṭaikaḻi Emperumān tiruviṭaiyāṭṭattil koḷvatāṉa nilamThe phrase ‘innilattukkumeṟpāṟkellai’ seems to have been omitted here.vāṇiviccātaran tirunantavaṉattu
kku kiḻakkum tenpāṟkellai ciṟupulattuku vaṭakkum kiḻpāṟkellai tirumātuṟai Uṭaiyār tevatānattukku meṟkum vaṭapāṟkellai peṇṇai Āṟṟukku teṟkum Innānkellaikkuḷpaṭṭa viracoḻan tirunantavaṉaṅkuḻi
65 100 10 Itil mel nokkiṉa maramum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum Uḷppaṭa kaikkoṇṭu Innilattukku nilamum Innilattukku varicaikku varicaiyum varicaittāḻvukku nilamum peṇṇainativāṇan marakkālukku Ulaka
ḷantān marakkāl vācikku nilamum camātānamākak kaikkoṇṭu parivattaṉaittiṭṭuk kuṭutteṉ tiruviṭaikaḻi Emperumān koyilil cicenāpati Āḻvānukku Uṭaiyār tiruviraṭṭāṉamuṭaiya nāyanār
rāḻampar koyil caṇṭecuranen Ippaṭi cattirātittavarai cellakkaṭavatu ji Ācciñaiyeva Itu panmāheśvararakṣai(rarakṣai) .
Digital edition of SII 41.2 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
